procedure.name: FeedSaveMessage
procedure.text:
/**************************************************************************************
Добавление/обновление родительского сообщения и добавление дочернего
**************************************************************************************/ CREATE PROCEDURE FeedSaveMessage -- Карточка объекта / родительское сообщение @Parent_Subject nvarchar(MAX), @Parent_Text nvarchar(MAX), @Parent_TextHtml nvarchar(MAX), @Parent_ActionUid uniqueidentifier, @Parent_ActionObjectUid uniqueidentifier, @Parent_ActionObjectId bigint, @Parent_CreationDate datetime, @Parent_CreationAuthor bigint, @Parent_MessageAttachments varbinary(MAX), @Parent_ObjectRecipients varbinary(MAX), @Parent_MessageObjects varbinary(MAX), @Parent_Url nvarchar(2000),
-- Комментарий / вопрос / ответ / сообщение по объекту @Subject nvarchar(MAX), @Text nvarchar(MAX), @TextHtml nvarchar(MAX), @ActionUid uniqueidentifier, @ActionObjectUid uniqueidentifier, @ActionObjectId bigint, @CreationAuthor bigint, @MessageAttachments varbinary(MAX), @ObjectRecipients varbinary(MAX), @MessageObjects varbinary(MAX), @Url nvarchar(2000),
@SaveComment bit, -- сохранить комментарий @ChangeDate datetime, -- дата изменения @ChangeDateHash nvarchar(16), -- хеш сообщения @Recipients nvarchar(MAX), -- строка со списком получателей сообщения, через запятую в формате (RecipientId:Priority) @SetReadForAuthor bit, -- установить прочитанным для автора @IdRangeStart bigint, -- первый идентификатор в таблице
@CheckParent bit, -- Нужно ли делать проверку на существование родительского сообщения @DateTimeNow datetime -- текущая дата AS BEGIN declare @Recipient bigint declare @feedId bigint declare @IsRead bit declare @Parent_IsRead bit declare @Parent_HasUnreadChild bit declare @Priority int
declare @tableRecipients TABLE ( [Id] bigint, [Priority] int )
declare @tableInsert TABLE ( [Id] bigint, [Subject] nvarchar(max) NULL, [Text] nvarchar(max) NULL, [ActionObjectUid] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL, [ActionUid] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL, [ActionObjectId] bigint NOT NULL, [Recipient] bigint NOT NULL, [CreationDate] datetime NOT NULL, [ChangeDate] datetime NOT NULL, [CreationAuthor] bigint NULL, [IsParent] bit NOT NULL, [ParentObjectId] bigint NULL, [ParentObjectUid] uniqueidentifier NULL, [ChildCount] int NULL, [IsRead] bit NULL, [ReadDate] datetime NULL, [HasUnreadChild] bit NULL, [UnreadCount] int NULL, [Priority] int NULL, [ChangeDateHash] nvarchar(35) NOT NULL, [MessageAttachments] varbinary(max) NULL, [ObjectRecipients] varbinary(max) NULL, [MessageObjects] varbinary(max) NULL, [Url] nvarchar(max) NULL, [TextHtml] nvarchar(max) NULL )
declare @tableUpdate TABLE ( [Id] [bigint] PRIMARY KEY, [ChildCount] [int] NULL, [IsRead] [bit] NULL, [ReadDate] [datetime] NULL, [HasUnreadChild] [bit] NULL, [UnreadCount] [int] NULL, [Priority] [int] NULL, [ParentObjectId] bigint NULL, [ParentObjectUid] uniqueidentifier NULL, [Recipient] bigint )
-- получатели insert into @tableRecipients (Id, Priority) select distinct Cast(left(val, patindex('%:%' , val) - 1) as bigint), Cast(stuff(val, 1, patindex('%:%' , val), '') as int) from SplitString(@Recipients, ',')
if (@CheckParent = 1) begin -- родительские сообщения, которые есть в ленте Feed INSERT INTO @tableUpdate ( [Id], [HasUnreadChild], [IsRead], [ReadDate], [UnreadCount], [ChildCount], [Priority], [Recipient], [ParentObjectId], [ParentObjectUid] ) select f.[Id], [HasUnreadChild], [IsRead], [ReadDate], [UnreadCount], [ChildCount], f.[Priority], [Recipient], [ParentObjectId], [ParentObjectUid] from Feed f WITH(nolock) inner join @tableRecipients r on f.[Recipient] = r.[Id] where [IsParent] = 1 and [ParentObjectId] = @Parent_ActionObjectId and [ParentObjectUid] = @Parent_ActionObjectUid
declare @tableMissingRecipients TABLE ( [Recipient] bigint)
insert into @tableMissingRecipients ([Recipient]) select tr.[Id] from @tableRecipients tr left join @tableUpdate tu on tr.[Id] = tu.[Recipient] group by tr.[Id], tu.[ParentObjectId], tu.[ParentObjectUid] having count(tu.[Recipient]) = 0
if ((select count(*) from @tableMissingRecipients) > 0) begin -- все сообщения, которые есть в архиве и нет в Feed INSERT INTO @tableInsert ( [Id], [ChangeDateHash], [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], [CreationDate], [ChangeDate], [CreationAuthor], [HasUnreadChild], [ActionUid], [ActionObjectUid], [ActionObjectId], [Recipient], [ParentObjectId], [ParentObjectUid], [IsRead], [ReadDate], [UnreadCount], [Priority], [ChildCount], [IsParent], [MessageAttachments], [ObjectRecipients], [MessageObjects], [Url] ) select a.[Id], case when [IsParent] = 1 then @ChangeDateHash + right('0000000000000000000' + cast(a.[Id] as varchar(19)), 19) else [ChangeDateHash] end, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], [CreationDate], [ChangeDate], [CreationAuthor], [HasUnreadChild], [ActionUid], [ActionObjectUid], [ActionObjectId], [Recipient], [ParentObjectId], [ParentObjectUid], [IsRead], [ReadDate], [UnreadCount], a.[Priority], [ChildCount], [IsParent], [MessageAttachments], [ObjectRecipients], [MessageObjects], [Url] from FeedArchive a WITH(nolock) inner join @tableRecipients r on a.[Recipient] = r.[Id] where [ParentObjectId] = @Parent_ActionObjectId and [ParentObjectUid] = @Parent_ActionObjectUid and ( ([IsParent] = 0 and not exists (select u.[Id] from @tableUpdate u where u.Recipient = a.[Recipient])) or ([IsParent] = 1 and not a.[Id] in (select u.[Id] from @tableUpdate u where u.Recipient = a.[Recipient])) ) end end -- создаём в цикле сообщения для каждого получателя declare @lastId bigint set @lastId = 0 while ((select count(*) from @tableRecipients where Id > @lastId) > 0) begin select top 1 @Recipient = Id, @Priority = Priority from @tableRecipients where Id > @lastId order by Id; set @lastId = @Recipient
set @Parent_HasUnreadChild = @SaveComment set @IsRead = 0 set @Parent_IsRead = 0 if @SetReadForAuthor = 1 begin if @SaveComment = 0 begin if @Recipient = @Parent_CreationAuthor begin set @Parent_IsRead = 1 end end else begin set @Parent_IsRead = 1 if @Recipient = @CreationAuthor begin set @IsRead = 1 set @Parent_HasUnreadChild = 0 end end end
-- обновляем родителей из ленты update @tableUpdate set [HasUnreadChild] = @Parent_HasUnreadChild, [IsRead] = @Parent_IsRead, [ReadDate] = (CASE WHEN @Parent_IsRead = 1 THEN @DateTimeNow ELSE NULL END), [UnreadCount] = @Parent_HasUnreadChild, [ChildCount] = @SaveComment, [Priority] = @Priority where [ParentObjectId] = @Parent_ActionObjectId and [ParentObjectUid] = @Parent_ActionObjectUid and [Recipient] = @Recipient
-- родителей в ленте не было, обновляем родителей из архива if @@ROWCOUNT = 0 begin update @tableInsert set [HasUnreadChild] = @Parent_HasUnreadChild, [IsRead] = @Parent_IsRead, [ReadDate] = (CASE WHEN @Parent_IsRead = 1 THEN @DateTimeNow ELSE [ReadDate] END), [UnreadCount] = @Parent_HasUnreadChild, [ChildCount] = [ChildCount] + @SaveComment, [Priority] = @Priority, [Subject] = @Parent_Subject, [Text] = @Parent_Text, [TextHtml] = @Parent_TextHtml, [ChangeDate] = @ChangeDate, [MessageAttachments] = @Parent_MessageAttachments, [ObjectRecipients] = @Parent_ObjectRecipients, [MessageObjects] = @Parent_MessageObjects, [Url] = @Parent_Url where [IsParent] = 1 and [ParentObjectId] = @Parent_ActionObjectId and [ParentObjectUid] = @Parent_ActionObjectUid and [Recipient] = @Recipient
-- родителей в архиве не было, создаём нового родителя if @@ROWCOUNT = 0 begin set @feedId = @IdRangeStart set @IdRangeStart = @IdRangeStart + 1 INSERT INTO @tableInsert ( [Id], [ChangeDateHash], [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], [CreationDate], [ChangeDate], [CreationAuthor], [HasUnreadChild], [ActionUid], [ActionObjectUid], [ActionObjectId], [Recipient], [ParentObjectId], [ParentObjectUid], [IsRead], [ReadDate], [UnreadCount], [Priority], [ChildCount], [IsParent], [MessageAttachments], [ObjectRecipients], [MessageObjects], [Url] ) VALUES (@feedId, @ChangeDateHash + right('0000000000000000000' + cast(@feedId as varchar(19)), 19), @Parent_Subject, @Parent_Text, @Parent_TextHtml, @Parent_CreationDate, @ChangeDate, @Parent_CreationAuthor, @Parent_HasUnreadChild, @Parent_ActionUid, @Parent_ActionObjectUid, @Parent_ActionObjectId, @Recipient, @Parent_ActionObjectId, @Parent_ActionObjectUid, @Parent_IsRead, (CASE WHEN @Parent_IsRead = 1 THEN @DateTimeNow ELSE NULL END), @Parent_HasUnreadChild, @Priority, @SaveComment, 1, @Parent_MessageAttachments, @Parent_ObjectRecipients, @Parent_MessageObjects, @Parent_Url) end end
-- создаём комментарий if @SaveComment = 1 begin
set @feedId = @IdRangeStart set @IdRangeStart = @IdRangeStart + 1 INSERT INTO @tableInsert ([Id], [ChangeDateHash], [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], [CreationDate], [ChangeDate], [CreationAuthor], [IsRead], [ReadDate], [ActionUid], [ActionObjectUid], [ActionObjectId], [Recipient], [ParentObjectId], [ParentObjectUid], [Priority], [IsParent], [UnreadCount], [ChildCount], [MessageAttachments], [ObjectRecipients], [MessageObjects], [Url]) VALUES (@feedId, @ChangeDateHash + right('0000000000000000000' + cast(@feedId as varchar(19)), 19), @Subject, @Text, @TextHtml, @ChangeDate, @ChangeDate, @CreationAuthor, @IsRead, (CASE WHEN @IsRead = 1 THEN @DateTimeNow ELSE NULL END), @ActionUid, @ActionObjectUid, @ActionObjectId, @Recipient, @Parent_ActionObjectId, @Parent_ActionObjectUid, @Priority, 0, 0, 0, @MessageAttachments, @ObjectRecipients, @MessageObjects, @Url)
end
end
INSERT INTO Feed ( [Id], [ChangeDateHash], [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], [CreationDate], [ChangeDate], [CreationAuthor], [HasUnreadChild], [IsRead], [ReadDate], [ActionUid], [ActionObjectUid], [ActionObjectId], [Recipient], [ParentObjectId], [ParentObjectUid], [Priority], [IsParent], [UnreadCount], [ChildCount], [MessageAttachments], [ObjectRecipients], [MessageObjects], [Url] ) Select [Id], [ChangeDateHash], [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], [CreationDate], [ChangeDate], [CreationAuthor], [HasUnreadChild], [IsRead], [ReadDate], [ActionUid], [ActionObjectUid], [ActionObjectId], [Recipient], [ParentObjectId], [ParentObjectUid], [Priority], [IsParent], [UnreadCount], [ChildCount], [MessageAttachments], [ObjectRecipients], [MessageObjects], [Url] from @tableInsert
UPDATE Feed SET [ChangeDateHash] = @ChangeDateHash + right('0000000000000000000' + cast(Feed.Id as varchar(19)), 19), [Subject] = @Parent_Subject, [Text] = @Parent_Text, [TextHtml] = @Parent_TextHtml, [ChangeDate] = @ChangeDate, [HasUnreadChild] = (CASE WHEN t.[HasUnreadChild] = 1 THEN 1 ELSE Feed.[HasUnreadChild] END), [ReadDate] = (CASE WHEN Feed.[ReadDate] is NULL THEN t.[ReadDate] ELSE Feed.[ReadDate] END), [UnreadCount] = ISNULL(Feed.[UnreadCount], 0) + t.[HasUnreadChild], [ChildCount] = Feed.[ChildCount] + t.[ChildCount], [MessageAttachments] = @Parent_MessageAttachments, [ObjectRecipients] = @Parent_ObjectRecipients, [MessageObjects] = @Parent_MessageObjects, [Priority] = t.[Priority], [Url] = @Parent_Url FROM @tableUpdate t Where Feed.Id = t.Id
END

procedure.name: FeedToArchiveRecipient
procedure.text:
/**************************************************************************************
Получить следующего пользователя для архивации
DateLimit дата архивации LastUserId последний архивированный пользователь NextUserId следующий пользователь для архивации (выходной параметр)
**************************************************************************************/ CREATE PROCEDURE &&FeedToArchiveRecipient&& @DateLimit datetime, @LastUserId bigint, @NextUserId bigint output AS BEGIN set @NextUserId = null
select top 1 @NextUserId = f.&&Recipient&& from &&Feed&& f where f.&&Recipient&& > @LastUserId and f.&&IsParent&& = 1 and f.&&ChangeDate&& < @DateLimit order by f.&&Recipient&&
if @NextUserId is null begin select top 1 @NextUserId = &&Recipient&& from &&Feed&& f where f.&&IsParent&& = 1 and f.&&ChangeDate&& < @DateLimit order by f.&&Recipient&& end
set @NextUserId = isnull(@NextUserId, 0) END

procedure.name: FeedToArchive
procedure.text:
/**************************************************************************************
Перенос старых сообщений в архив
**************************************************************************************/ CREATE PROCEDURE &&FeedToArchive&& @DateLimit datetime, @LastUserId bigint, @CurrentDate datetime AS BEGIN declare @tableOld TABLE ( &&ParentObjectId&& bigint NULL, &&ParentObjectUid&& uniqueidentifier NULL, &&ParentChangeDate&& datetime NOT NULL )
declare @userId bigint, @count bigint exec &&FeedToArchiveRecipient&& @DateLimit = @DateLimit, @LastUserId = @LastUserId, @NextUserId = @userId output
if @userId <> 0 -- найден следующий пользователь begin
insert into @tableOld (&&ParentObjectId&&, &&ParentObjectUid&&, &&ParentChangeDate&&) select &&ParentObjectId&&, &&ParentObjectUid&&, &&ChangeDate&& from &&Feed&& f with (nolock) where f.&&IsParent&& = 1 and f.&&ChangeDate&& < @DateLimit and f.&&Recipient&& = @userId and not exists (select &&Id&& from &&FeedFavorite&& ff where ff.&&ActionObjectId&& = f.&&ParentObjectId&& and ff.&&ActionObjectUid&& = f.&&ParentObjectUid&& and ff.&&Recipient&& = f.&&Recipient&& and (ff.&&IsDelete&& is null or ff.&&IsDelete&& = 0))
-- если есть что обновлять, то обновляем select @count = count(*) from @tableOld if @count <> 0 begin
-- обновляем архив update a set a.Id = f.Id, a.Subject = f.Subject, a.Text = f.Text, a.TextHtml = f.TextHtml, a.ActionObjectUid = f.ActionObjectUid, a.ActionUid = f.ActionUid, a.ActionObjectId = f.ActionObjectId, a.Recipient = f.Recipient, a.CreationDate = f.CreationDate, a.ChangeDate = f.ChangeDate, a.CreationAuthor = f.CreationAuthor, a.IsParent = f.IsParent, a.ParentObjectId = f.ParentObjectId, a.ParentObjectUid = f.ParentObjectUid, a.ChildCount = f.ChildCount, a.IsRead = 1, a.ReadDate = @CurrentDate, a.HasUnreadChild = 0, a.UnreadCount = 0, a.Priority = f.Priority, a.ChangeDateHash = f.ChangeDateHash, a.MessageAttachments = f.MessageAttachments, a.ObjectRecipients = f.ObjectRecipients, a.MessageObjects = f.MessageObjects, a.Url = f.Url from FeedArchive a with (nolock) inner join Feed f with (nolock) on f.Id = a.Id inner join @tableOld t on t.ParentObjectId = f.ParentObjectId and t.ParentObjectUid = f.ParentObjectUid and f.Recipient = @userId
-- копируем в архив insert into FeedArchive ( Id, Subject, Text, TextHtml, ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, IsParent, ParentObjectId, ParentObjectUid, ChildCount, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, Priority, ChangeDateHash, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, Url ) select f.Id, f.Subject, f.Text, f.TextHtml, f.ActionObjectUid, f.ActionUid, f.ActionObjectId, f.Recipient, f.CreationDate, f.ChangeDate, f.CreationAuthor, f.IsParent, f.ParentObjectId, f.ParentObjectUid, f.ChildCount, 1, @CurrentDate, 0, 0, f.Priority, f.ChangeDateHash, f.MessageAttachments, f.ObjectRecipients, f.MessageObjects, f.Url from Feed f with (nolock) inner join @tableOld t on t.ParentObjectId = f.ParentObjectId and t.ParentObjectUid = f.ParentObjectUid and f.Recipient = @userId where not exists (select 1 from FeedArchive where Id = f.Id)
-- удаляем из ленты, если не изменилось и не добавлено в архив delete f from Feed f with (nolock) inner join Feed fp with (nolock) on fp.IsParent = 1 and fp.ParentObjectId = f.ParentObjectId and fp.ParentObjectUid = f.ParentObjectUid and fp.Recipient = f.Recipient where f.Recipient = @userId and exists (select * from @tableOld t where t.ParentObjectId = f.ParentObjectId and t.ParentObjectUid = f.ParentObjectUid and t.ParentChangeDate = fp.ChangeDate) and not exists (select 1 from FeedFavorite ff where (ff.IsDelete is null or ff.IsDelete = 0) and ff.ActionObjectId = f.ParentObjectId and ff.ActionObjectUid = f.ParentObjectUid and ff.Recipient = @userId)
end end
select @userId END

procedure.name: FeedSetAsRead
procedure.text:
/**************************************************************************************
Установка сообщениям статуса "прочитано"
**************************************************************************************/ CREATE PROCEDURE FeedSetAsRead @ChangeDateHash nvarchar(35), @Recipient bigint, @ActionObjectUid uniqueidentifier, @ActionObjectId bigint, @DateTimeNow datetime AS BEGIN
declare @tableUpdate TABLE ( [Id] [bigint] PRIMARY KEY, [HasUnreadChild] [bit] NULL, [UnreadCount] [int] NULL, [UnreadCountOld] [int] NULL, [IsParent] [bit] NOT NULL )
declare @RowCount bigint
INSERT INTO @tableUpdate ([Id], [IsParent], [UnreadCount], [UnreadCountOld])
select [Id], IsParent, UnreadCount, UnreadCount from Feed with (nolock) where Recipient = @Recipient and ParentObjectId = @ActionObjectId and ParentObjectUid = @ActionObjectUid and ( IsParent = 1 or ( IsRead = 0 and ChangeDateHash <= isnull(@ChangeDateHash, 'z') ) )
select @RowCount = COUNT(Id) from @tableUpdate where IsParent = 0
update @tableUpdate set UnreadCount = UnreadCount - @RowCount where IsParent = 1
update Feed set IsRead = 1, ReadDate = @DateTimeNow, UnreadCount = (CASE WHEN t.IsParent = 1 THEN t.UnreadCount + (Feed.UnreadCount - t.UnreadCountOld) ELSE Feed.UnreadCount END), HasUnreadChild = (CASE WHEN t.IsParent = 1 THEN (CASE WHEN t.UnreadCount + (Feed.UnreadCount - t.UnreadCountOld) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) ELSE Feed.HasUnreadChild END) from @tableUpdate t where t.Id = Feed.Id
END

procedure.name: FeedSetAsReadAll
procedure.text:
/**************************************************************************************
Отметить все родительские сообщения и их комментарии, как прочитанные.
**************************************************************************************/ CREATE PROCEDURE FeedSetAsReadAll @ChangeDateHashMin nvarchar(35), @ChangeDateHashMax nvarchar(35), @Recipient bigint, @Priority int, @DateTimeNow datetime AS BEGIN
update fc set IsRead = 1, ReadDate = @DateTimeNow, UnreadCount = 0, HasUnreadChild = 0 from Feed fc inner join Feed f with (nolock) on f.IsParent = 1 and f.Recipient = @Recipient and (f.IsRead = 0 or f.HasUnreadChild = 1) and f.ChangeDateHash >= isnull(@ChangeDateHashMin, '') and f.ChangeDateHash <= isnull(@ChangeDateHashMax, 'z') and f.ParentObjectId = fc.ParentObjectId and f.ParentObjectUid = fc.ParentObjectUid and (@Priority is null or f.Priority >= @Priority) where fc.Recipient = @Recipient and (fc.IsRead = 0 or fc.HasUnreadChild = 1)
END

procedure.name: FeedLoad
procedure.text:
/**************************************************************************************
Загрузка сообщений
**************************************************************************************/ CREATE PROCEDURE FeedLoad @MaxCount bigint, @MaxChildCount bigint, @Recipient bigint, @ChangeDateHash nvarchar(35), @Priority int, @AllMessages bit AS BEGIN set @ChangeDateHash = isnull(@ChangeDateHash, 'Z');
declare @FeedTemp table (ParentObjectUid uniqueidentifier NOT NULL, ParentObjectId bigint NOT NULL, UNIQUE NONCLUSTERED (ParentObjectUid ASC, ParentObjectId ASC))
insert into @FeedTemp (ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId) select DISTINCT ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId from ( select TOP (@MaxCount) ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId from Feed fp WITH (NOLOCK) where fp.IsParent = 1 and fp.Recipient = @Recipient and fp.ChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash and Priority >= isnull(@Priority, 0) and (@AllMessages = 1 or HasUnreadChild = 1 or IsRead = 0) order by ChangeDateHash DESC) f
--родительские сообщения select Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, fp.ParentObjectId, fp.ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url] from Feed fp WITH (NOLOCK) right join @FeedTemp ft on ft.ParentObjectUid = fp.ParentObjectUid and ft.ParentObjectId = fp.ParentObjectId where fp.[IsParent] = 1 and fp.Recipient = @Recipient
UNION ALL
--дочерние сообщения select c.Id, c.[Subject], c.[Text], c.[TextHtml], c.ActionObjectUid, c.ActionUid, c.ActionObjectId, c.Recipient, c.CreationDate, c.ChangeDate, c.CreationAuthor, c.ParentObjectId, c.ParentObjectUid, c.IsRead, c.ReadDate, c.HasUnreadChild, c.UnreadCount, c.[Priority], c.ChangeDateHash, c.IsParent, c.ChildCount, c.MessageAttachments, c.ObjectRecipients, c.MessageObjects, c.[Url] from ( select ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by fc.ParentObjectUid, fc.ParentObjectId order by fc.ChangeDateHash desc) rownum, * from Feed fc WITH (NOLOCK) where fc.[IsParent] = 0 and fc.Recipient = @Recipient and exists (select TOP 1 Id from @FeedTemp t where t.ParentObjectUid = fc.ParentObjectUid and t.ParentObjectId = fc.ParentObjectId) and (@AllMessages = 1 or fc.IsRead = 0) ) c where c.rownum <= @MaxChildCount order by ChangeDateHash
END

procedure.name: FeedFavoriteLoad
procedure.text:
/**************************************************************************************
Загрузка избранных сообщений
**************************************************************************************/ CREATE PROCEDURE FeedFavoriteLoad @MaxCount bigint, @Recipient bigint, @ChangeDateHash nvarchar(16) AS BEGIN
declare @FeedTemp table (ChangeDateHash nvarchar(16), ParentObjectUid uniqueidentifier NOT NULL, ParentObjectId bigint NOT NULL, UNIQUE NONCLUSTERED (ParentObjectUid ASC, ParentObjectId ASC))
declare @tableParent TABLE ( [FavoriteChangeDateHash] nvarchar(16), [Id] bigint, [Subject] nvarchar(max) NULL, [Text] nvarchar(max) NULL, [ActionObjectUid] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL, [ActionUid] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL, [ActionObjectId] bigint NOT NULL, [Recipient] bigint NOT NULL, [CreationDate] datetime NOT NULL, [ChangeDate] datetime NOT NULL, [CreationAuthor] bigint NULL, [IsParent] bit NOT NULL, [ParentObjectId] bigint NULL, [ParentObjectUid] uniqueidentifier NULL, [ChildCount] int NULL, [IsRead] bit NULL, [ReadDate] datetime NULL, [HasUnreadChild] bit NULL, [UnreadCount] int NULL, [Priority] int NULL, [ChangeDateHash] nvarchar(35) NOT NULL, [MessageAttachments] varbinary(max) NULL, [ObjectRecipients] varbinary(max) NULL, [MessageObjects] varbinary(max) NULL, [Url] nvarchar(max) NULL, [TextHtml] nvarchar(max) NULL, UNIQUE NONCLUSTERED (ParentObjectUid ASC, ParentObjectId ASC) )
set @ChangeDateHash = isnull(@ChangeDateHash, 'Z');
insert into @FeedTemp (ChangeDateHash, ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId) select ChangeDateHash, ActionObjectUid, ActionObjectId from ( select TOP (@MaxCount) ChangeDateHash, ActionObjectUid, ActionObjectId from FeedFavorite fp WITH (NOLOCK) where fp.Recipient = @Recipient and fp.IsDelete = 0 and fp.ChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash order by ChangeDateHash DESC ) f
-- сообщения ленты insert into @tableParent (FavoriteChangeDateHash, Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, ParentObjectId, ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url]) select ft.ChangeDateHash, fp.Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, fp.ParentObjectId, fp.ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], fp.ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url] from Feed fp WITH (NOLOCK) inner join @FeedTemp ft on ft.ParentObjectUid = fp.ParentObjectUid and ft.ParentObjectId = fp.ParentObjectId where fp.[IsParent] = 1 and fp.Recipient = @Recipient
-- сообщения ленты и архива select Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, ParentObjectId, ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url] from ( select FavoriteChangeDateHash, Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, ParentObjectId, ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url] from @tableParent union all select ft.ChangeDateHash FavoriteChangeDateHash, fp.Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, fp.ParentObjectId, fp.ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], fp.ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url] from FeedArchive fp WITH (NOLOCK) right join ( select t.ChangeDateHash, t.ParentObjectId, t.ParentObjectUid from @FeedTemp t left join @tableParent p on p.ParentObjectId = t.ParentObjectId and p.ParentObjectUid = t.ParentObjectUid where p.Id is null ) ft on ft.ParentObjectUid = fp.ParentObjectUid and ft.ParentObjectId = fp.ParentObjectId where fp.[IsParent] = 1 and fp.Recipient = @Recipient ) f order by FavoriteChangeDateHash desc
END

procedure.name: FeedLoadNew
procedure.text:
/**************************************************************************************
Загрузка новых сообщений
**************************************************************************************/ CREATE PROCEDURE FeedLoadNew @MaxCount bigint, @MaxChildCount bigint, @Recipient bigint, @ChangeDateHash nvarchar(35), @AllMessages bit AS BEGIN
set @ChangeDateHash = isnull(@ChangeDateHash, '');
declare @FeedTemp table (ParentObjectUid uniqueidentifier NOT NULL, ParentObjectId bigint NOT NULL, UNIQUE NONCLUSTERED (ParentObjectUid ASC, ParentObjectId ASC))
insert into @FeedTemp (ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId) select DISTINCT ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId from ( select TOP (@MaxCount) ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId from Feed fp WITH (NOLOCK) where fp.IsParent = 1 and fp.Recipient = @Recipient and fp.ChangeDateHash > @ChangeDateHash and (@AllMessages = 1 or HasUnreadChild = 1 or IsRead = 0) order by ChangeDateHash) f
--родительские сообщения select Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, fp.ParentObjectId, fp.ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url] from Feed fp WITH (NOLOCK) right join @FeedTemp ft on ft.ParentObjectUid = fp.ParentObjectUid and ft.ParentObjectId = fp.ParentObjectId where fp.[IsParent] = 1 and fp.Recipient = @Recipient
UNION ALL
--дочерние сообщения select c.Id, c.[Subject], c.[Text], c.[TextHtml], c.ActionObjectUid, c.ActionUid, c.ActionObjectId, c.Recipient, c.CreationDate, c.ChangeDate, c.CreationAuthor, c.ParentObjectId, c.ParentObjectUid, c.IsRead, c.ReadDate, c.HasUnreadChild, c.UnreadCount, c.[Priority], c.ChangeDateHash, c.IsParent, c.ChildCount, c.MessageAttachments, c.ObjectRecipients, c.MessageObjects, c.[Url] from ( select ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by fc.ParentObjectUid, fc.ParentObjectId order by fc.ChangeDateHash) rownum, * from Feed fc WITH (NOLOCK) where fc.[IsParent] = 0 and fc.Recipient = @Recipient and exists (select TOP 1 Id from @FeedTemp t where t.ParentObjectUid = fc.ParentObjectUid and t.ParentObjectId = fc.ParentObjectId) and ChangeDateHash > @ChangeDateHash ) c where c.rownum <= @MaxChildCount
END

procedure.name: FeedFavoriteLoadNew
FeedInfoLoadNew
procedure.text:
/**************************************************************************************
Загрузка информации по объектам сообщений ленты
**************************************************************************************/ CREATE PROCEDURE FeedInfoLoadNew @ChangeDate datetime, @Recipient bigint, @MaxCount bigint AS BEGIN
select top (@MaxCount) i.Id, i.Recipient, i.ActionObjectId, i.ActionObjectUid, i.ChangeDate, i.Data from FeedInfo i with (nolock) inner join ( select i1.ActionObjectUid, i1.ActionObjectId, i1.Recipient, MAX(i1.ChangeDate) ChangeDate from FeedInfo i1 with (nolock) where i1.Recipient = @Recipient group by i1.ActionObjectUid, i1.ActionObjectId, i1.Recipient ) f on f.ActionObjectUid = i.ActionObjectUid and f.ActionObjectId = i.ActionObjectId and f.Recipient = i.Recipient and f.ChangeDate = i.ChangeDate where @ChangeDate is NULL or i.ChangeDate > @ChangeDate order by i.ChangeDate
END

procedure.name: FeedMessageLoad
procedure.text:
/**************************************************************************************
Загружает указанное сообщение со всеми комментариями.
**************************************************************************************/ CREATE PROCEDURE FeedMessageLoad @Id bigint AS BEGIN
select f.* from Feed f with (nolock) inner join Feed ff with (nolock) on ff.Id = @Id and ff.Recipient = f.Recipient and ff.ParentObjectId = f.ParentObjectId and ff.ParentObjectUid = f.ParentObjectUid order by f.IsParent desc, f.ChangeDateHash desc
END

procedure.name: FeedParentMessageLoad
FeedSearch
procedure.text:
/**************************************************************************************
Фильтрация сообщений
**************************************************************************************/ CREATE PROCEDURE FeedSearch @MaxCount bigint, @MaxChildCount bigint, @Recipient bigint, @ChangeDateHash nvarchar(35), @FastSearch nvarchar(255), @ChangeDateFrom datetime, @ChangeDateTo datetime, @FeedAuthors nvarchar(max), @OnlyUnread bit AS BEGIN
declare @FeedTempAuthors table (Id bigint)
if (@FeedAuthors is not NULL) begin insert into @FeedTempAuthors (Id) select VAL from SplitString(@FeedAuthors, ',') end
declare @FeedTemp table (ParentObjectUid uniqueidentifier NOT NULL, ParentObjectId bigint NOT NULL, UNIQUE NONCLUSTERED (ParentObjectUid ASC, ParentObjectId ASC))
declare @tableParent TABLE ( [Id] bigint, [Subject] nvarchar(max) NULL, [Text] nvarchar(max) NULL, [ActionObjectUid] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL, [ActionUid] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL, [ActionObjectId] bigint NOT NULL, [Recipient] bigint NOT NULL, [CreationDate] datetime NOT NULL, [ChangeDate] datetime NOT NULL, [CreationAuthor] bigint NULL, [IsParent] bit NOT NULL, [ParentObjectId] bigint NULL, [ParentObjectUid] uniqueidentifier NULL, [ChildCount] int NULL, [IsRead] bit NULL, [ReadDate] datetime NULL, [HasUnreadChild] bit NULL, [UnreadCount] int NULL, [Priority] int NULL, [ChangeDateHash] nvarchar(35) NOT NULL, [MessageAttachments] varbinary(max) NULL, [ObjectRecipients] varbinary(max) NULL, [MessageObjects] varbinary(max) NULL, [Url] nvarchar(max) NULL, [TextHtml] nvarchar(max) NULL, UNIQUE NONCLUSTERED (ParentObjectUid ASC, ParentObjectId ASC) )
set @ChangeDateHash = isnull(@ChangeDateHash, 'Z');
if (@FeedAuthors is NULL) --поиск без учета авторов begin
-- получаем все объекты, соответствующие условиям поиска insert into @FeedTemp (ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId) select DISTINCT ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId from ( select TOP (999999999999999999) ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId from Feed fp WITH (NOLOCK) where fp.Recipient = @Recipient and fp.ChangeDate >= @ChangeDateFrom and (@ChangeDateTo is NULL or fp.ChangeDate <= @ChangeDateTo) and fp.ChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash and (@OnlyUnread = 0 or fp.IsRead = 0) and ( @FastSearch is NULL or fp.[Text] like @FastSearch or fp.[Subject] like @FastSearch )) f
group by ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId
--родительские сообщения insert into @tableParent (Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, ParentObjectId, ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url]) select TOP (@MaxCount) Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, fp.ParentObjectId, fp.ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url] from Feed fp WITH (NOLOCK) right join @FeedTemp ft on ft.ParentObjectUid = fp.ParentObjectUid and ft.ParentObjectId = fp.ParentObjectId where fp.[IsParent] = 1 and fp.Recipient = @Recipient and fp.ChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash order by ChangeDateHash DESC
select Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, ParentObjectId, ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url] from @tableParent
UNION ALL
--дочерние сообщения select c.Id, c.[Subject], c.[Text], c.[TextHtml], c.ActionObjectUid, c.ActionUid, c.ActionObjectId, c.Recipient, c.CreationDate, c.ChangeDate, c.CreationAuthor, c.ParentObjectId, c.ParentObjectUid, c.IsRead, c.ReadDate, c.HasUnreadChild, c.UnreadCount, c.[Priority], c.ChangeDateHash, c.IsParent, c.ChildCount, c.MessageAttachments, c.ObjectRecipients, c.MessageObjects, c.[Url] from ( select ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by fc.ParentObjectUid, fc.ParentObjectId order by fc.ChangeDateHash desc) rownum, * from Feed fc WITH (NOLOCK) where fc.[IsParent] = 0 and fc.Recipient = @Recipient and (@ChangeDateTo is NULL or fc.ChangeDate <= @ChangeDateTo) and exists (select TOP 1 Id from @tableParent t where t.ParentObjectUid = fc.ParentObjectUid and t.ParentObjectId = fc.ParentObjectId) and (@OnlyUnread = 0 or fc.IsRead = 0) and ( @FastSearch is NULL or fc.[Text] like @FastSearch or fc.[Subject] like @FastSearch ) ) c where c.rownum <= @MaxChildCount order by ChangeDateHash
end else begin --поиск с учетом авторов
-- получаем все объекты, соответствующие условиям поиска insert into @FeedTemp (ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId) select DISTINCT ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId from ( select TOP (999999999999999999) ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId from Feed fp WITH (NOLOCK) where fp.Recipient = @Recipient and fp.ChangeDate >= @ChangeDateFrom and (@ChangeDateTo is NULL or fp.ChangeDate <= @ChangeDateTo) and fp.ChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash and (fp.CreationAuthor in (select Id from @FeedTempAuthors)) and (@OnlyUnread = 0 or fp.IsRead = 0) and ( @FastSearch is NULL or fp.[Text] like @FastSearch or fp.[Subject] like @FastSearch )
group by ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId order by MAX(ChangeDateHash) DESC) f
--родительские сообщения insert into @tableParent (Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, ParentObjectId, ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url]) select TOP (@MaxCount) Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, fp.ParentObjectId, fp.ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url] from Feed fp WITH (NOLOCK) right join @FeedTemp ft on ft.ParentObjectUid = fp.ParentObjectUid and ft.ParentObjectId = fp.ParentObjectId where fp.[IsParent] = 1 and fp.Recipient = @Recipient and fp.ChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash order by ChangeDateHash DESC
select Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, ParentObjectId, ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url] from @tableParent
UNION ALL
--дочерние сообщения select c.Id, c.[Subject], c.[Text], c.[TextHtml], c.ActionObjectUid, c.ActionUid, c.ActionObjectId, c.Recipient, c.CreationDate, c.ChangeDate, c.CreationAuthor, c.ParentObjectId, c.ParentObjectUid, c.IsRead, c.ReadDate, c.HasUnreadChild, c.UnreadCount, c.[Priority], c.ChangeDateHash, c.IsParent, c.ChildCount, c.MessageAttachments, c.ObjectRecipients, c.MessageObjects, c.[Url] from ( select ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by fc.ParentObjectUid, fc.ParentObjectId order by fc.ChangeDateHash) rownum, * from Feed fc WITH (NOLOCK) where fc.[IsParent] = 0 and fc.Recipient = @Recipient and fc.ChangeDate >= @ChangeDateFrom and (@ChangeDateTo is NULL or fc.ChangeDate <= @ChangeDateTo) and (fc.CreationAuthor in (select Id from @FeedTempAuthors)) and exists (select TOP 1 Id from @tableParent t where t.ParentObjectUid = fc.ParentObjectUid and t.ParentObjectId = fc.ParentObjectId) and (@OnlyUnread = 0 or fc.IsRead = 0) and ( @FastSearch is NULL or fc.[Text] like @FastSearch or fc.[Subject] like @FastSearch ) ) c where c.rownum <= @MaxChildCount
end
END

procedure.name: FeedArchiveSearch
procedure.text:
/**************************************************************************************
Фильтрация сообщений, включая сообщения архива
**************************************************************************************/ CREATE PROCEDURE FeedArchiveSearch @MaxCount bigint, @MaxChildCount bigint, @Recipient bigint, @ChangeDateHash nvarchar(35), @FastSearch nvarchar(255), @ChangeDateFrom datetime, @ChangeDateTo datetime, @FeedAuthors nvarchar(max), @OnlyUnread bit AS BEGIN
set @ChangeDateHash = isnull(@ChangeDateHash, 'Z');
declare @FeedTempAuthors table (Id bigint)
if (@FeedAuthors is not NULL) begin insert into @FeedTempAuthors (Id) select VAL from SplitString(@FeedAuthors, ',') end
declare @FeedTemp table ( ParentObjectUid uniqueidentifier NOT NULL, ParentObjectId bigint NOT NULL, IsArchive bit NOT NULL, UNIQUE NONCLUSTERED (ParentObjectUid ASC, ParentObjectId ASC))
declare @tableParent TABLE ( [Id] bigint, [Subject] nvarchar(max) NULL, [Text] nvarchar(max) NULL, [ActionObjectUid] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL, [ActionUid] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL, [ActionObjectId] bigint NOT NULL, [Recipient] bigint NOT NULL, [CreationDate] datetime NOT NULL, [ChangeDate] datetime NOT NULL, [CreationAuthor] bigint NULL, [IsParent] bit NOT NULL, [ParentObjectId] bigint NULL, [ParentObjectUid] uniqueidentifier NULL, [ChildCount] int NULL, [IsRead] bit NULL, [ReadDate] datetime NULL, [HasUnreadChild] bit NULL, [UnreadCount] int NULL, [Priority] int NULL, [ChangeDateHash] nvarchar(35) NOT NULL, [MessageAttachments] varbinary(max) NULL, [ObjectRecipients] varbinary(max) NULL, [MessageObjects] varbinary(max) NULL, [Url] nvarchar(max) NULL, [TextHtml] nvarchar(max) NULL, IsArchive bit NOT NULL, UNIQUE NONCLUSTERED (ParentObjectUid ASC, ParentObjectId ASC) )
if (@FeedAuthors is NULL) --поиск без учета авторов begin
-- получаем все объекты, соответствующие условиям поиска insert into @FeedTemp (ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId, IsArchive) select DISTINCT ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId, Min(IsArchive) from ( select TOP (999999999999999999) ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId, 0 IsArchive from Feed fp WITH (NOLOCK) where fp.Recipient = @Recipient and fp.ChangeDate >= @ChangeDateFrom and (@ChangeDateTo is NULL or fp.ChangeDate <= @ChangeDateTo) and fp.ChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash and (@OnlyUnread = 0 or fp.IsRead = 0) and ( @FastSearch is NULL or fp.[Text] like @FastSearch or fp.[Subject] like @FastSearch )
union all
select TOP (999999999999999999) ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId, 1 IsArchive from FeedArchive fp WITH (NOLOCK) where fp.Recipient = @Recipient and fp.ChangeDate >= @ChangeDateFrom and (@ChangeDateTo is NULL or fp.ChangeDate <= @ChangeDateTo) and fp.ChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash and ( @FastSearch is NULL or fp.[Text] like @FastSearch or fp.[Subject] like @FastSearch )) f
group by ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId
--родительские сообщения insert into @tableParent (Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, ParentObjectId, ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url], IsArchive) select TOP (@MaxCount) Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, f.ParentObjectId, f.ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url], IsArchive from ( select TOP (@MaxCount) Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, fp.ParentObjectId, fp.ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url], 0 IsArchive from Feed fp WITH (NOLOCK) right join @FeedTemp ft on ft.IsArchive = 0 and ft.ParentObjectUid = fp.ParentObjectUid and ft.ParentObjectId = fp.ParentObjectId where fp.[IsParent] = 1 and fp.Recipient = @Recipient and fp.ChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash order by ChangeDateHash DESC union all select TOP (@MaxCount) Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, fp.ParentObjectId, fp.ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url], 1 IsArchive from FeedArchive fp WITH (NOLOCK) right join @FeedTemp ft on ft.IsArchive = 1 and ft.ParentObjectUid = fp.ParentObjectUid and ft.ParentObjectId = fp.ParentObjectId where fp.[IsParent] = 1 and fp.Recipient = @Recipient and fp.ChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash order by ChangeDateHash DESC ) f order by ChangeDateHash DESC
select Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, ParentObjectId, ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url] from @tableParent
UNION ALL
--дочерние сообщения select c.Id, c.[Subject], c.[Text], c.[TextHtml], c.ActionObjectUid, c.ActionUid, c.ActionObjectId, c.Recipient, c.CreationDate, c.ChangeDate, c.CreationAuthor, c.ParentObjectId, c.ParentObjectUid, c.IsRead, c.ReadDate, c.HasUnreadChild, c.UnreadCount, c.[Priority], c.ChangeDateHash, c.IsParent, c.ChildCount, c.MessageAttachments, c.ObjectRecipients, c.MessageObjects, c.[Url] from ( select ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by f.ParentObjectUid, f.ParentObjectId order by f.ChangeDateHash desc) rownum, * from ( select Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, ParentObjectId, ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url] from Feed fc WITH (NOLOCK) where fc.[IsParent] = 0 and fc.Recipient = @Recipient and (@ChangeDateTo is NULL or fc.ChangeDate <= @ChangeDateTo) and exists (select TOP 1 Id from @tableParent t where t.IsArchive = 0 and t.ParentObjectUid = fc.ParentObjectUid and t.ParentObjectId = fc.ParentObjectId) and ( @FastSearch is NULL or fc.[Text] like @FastSearch or fc.[Subject] like @FastSearch ) union all select Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, ParentObjectId, ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url] from FeedArchive fc WITH (NOLOCK) where fc.[IsParent] = 0 and fc.Recipient = @Recipient and (@ChangeDateTo is NULL or fc.ChangeDate <= @ChangeDateTo) and exists (select TOP 1 Id from @tableParent t where t.IsArchive = 1 and t.ParentObjectUid = fc.ParentObjectUid and t.ParentObjectId = fc.ParentObjectId) and (@OnlyUnread = 0 or fc.IsRead = 0) and ( @FastSearch is NULL or fc.[Text] like @FastSearch or fc.[Subject] like @FastSearch ) ) f ) c where c.rownum <= @MaxChildCount order by ChangeDateHash
end else begin --поиск с учетом авторов
-- получаем все объекты, соответствующие условиям поиска insert into @FeedTemp (ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId, IsArchive) select DISTINCT ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId, Min(IsArchive) from ( select TOP (999999999999999999) ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId, 0 IsArchive from Feed fp WITH (NOLOCK) where fp.Recipient = @Recipient and fp.ChangeDate >= @ChangeDateFrom and (@ChangeDateTo is NULL or fp.ChangeDate <= @ChangeDateTo) and fp.ChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash and (fp.CreationAuthor in (select Id from @FeedTempAuthors)) and (@OnlyUnread = 0 or fp.IsRead = 0) and ( @FastSearch is NULL or fp.[Text] like @FastSearch or fp.[Subject] like @FastSearch )
union all
select TOP (999999999999999999) ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId, 1 IsArchive from FeedArchive fp WITH (NOLOCK) where fp.Recipient = @Recipient and fp.ChangeDate >= @ChangeDateFrom and (@ChangeDateTo is NULL or fp.ChangeDate <= @ChangeDateTo) and fp.ChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash and (fp.CreationAuthor in (select Id from @FeedTempAuthors)) and ( @FastSearch is NULL or fp.[Text] like @FastSearch or fp.[Subject] like @FastSearch )) f
group by ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId
--родительские сообщения insert into @tableParent (Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, ParentObjectId, ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url], IsArchive) select TOP (@MaxCount) Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, f.ParentObjectId, f.ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url], IsArchive from ( select TOP (@MaxCount) Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, fp.ParentObjectId, fp.ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url], 0 IsArchive from Feed fp WITH (NOLOCK) right join @FeedTemp ft on ft.IsArchive = 0 and ft.ParentObjectUid = fp.ParentObjectUid and ft.ParentObjectId = fp.ParentObjectId where fp.[IsParent] = 1 and fp.Recipient = @Recipient and fp.ChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash order by ChangeDateHash DESC union all select TOP (@MaxCount) Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, fp.ParentObjectId, fp.ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url], 1 IsArchive from FeedArchive fp WITH (NOLOCK) right join @FeedTemp ft on ft.IsArchive = 1 and ft.ParentObjectUid = fp.ParentObjectUid and ft.ParentObjectId = fp.ParentObjectId where fp.[IsParent] = 1 and fp.Recipient = @Recipient and fp.ChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash order by ChangeDateHash DESC ) f order by ChangeDateHash DESC
select Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, ParentObjectId, ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url] from @tableParent
UNION ALL
--дочерние сообщения select c.Id, c.[Subject], c.[Text], c.[TextHtml], c.ActionObjectUid, c.ActionUid, c.ActionObjectId, c.Recipient, c.CreationDate, c.ChangeDate, c.CreationAuthor, c.ParentObjectId, c.ParentObjectUid, c.IsRead, c.ReadDate, c.HasUnreadChild, c.UnreadCount, c.[Priority], c.ChangeDateHash, c.IsParent, c.ChildCount, c.MessageAttachments, c.ObjectRecipients, c.MessageObjects, c.[Url] from ( select ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by f.ParentObjectUid, f.ParentObjectId order by f.ChangeDateHash) rownum, * from ( select Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, ParentObjectId, ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url] from Feed fc WITH (NOLOCK) where fc.[IsParent] = 0 and fc.Recipient = @Recipient and fc.ChangeDate >= @ChangeDateFrom and (@ChangeDateTo is NULL or fc.ChangeDate <= @ChangeDateTo) and (fc.CreationAuthor in (select Id from @FeedTempAuthors)) and exists (select TOP 1 Id from @tableParent t where t.IsArchive = 0 and t.ParentObjectUid = fc.ParentObjectUid and t.ParentObjectId = fc.ParentObjectId) and ( @FastSearch is NULL or fc.[Text] like @FastSearch or fc.[Subject] like @FastSearch ) union all select Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, ParentObjectId, ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url] from Feed fc WITH (NOLOCK) where fc.[IsParent] = 0 and fc.Recipient = @Recipient and fc.ChangeDate >= @ChangeDateFrom and (@ChangeDateTo is NULL or fc.ChangeDate <= @ChangeDateTo) and (fc.CreationAuthor in (select Id from @FeedTempAuthors)) and exists (select TOP 1 Id from @tableParent t where t.IsArchive = 1 and t.ParentObjectUid = fc.ParentObjectUid and t.ParentObjectId = fc.ParentObjectId) and (@OnlyUnread = 0 or fc.IsRead = 0) and ( @FastSearch is NULL or fc.[Text] like @FastSearch or fc.[Subject] like @FastSearch ) ) f ) c where c.rownum <= @MaxChildCount order by ChangeDateHash
end
END

procedure.name: FeedFavoritsSearch
procedure.text:
/**************************************************************************************
Поиск в избранных сообщениях
**************************************************************************************/ CREATE PROCEDURE FeedFavoritsSearch @MaxCount bigint, @Recipient bigint, @ChangeDateHash nvarchar(16), @FastSearch nvarchar(255), @ChangeDateFrom datetime, @ChangeDateTo datetime, @FeedAuthors nvarchar(max), @OnlyUnread bit AS BEGIN
declare @FeedTempAuthors table (Id bigint)
set @ChangeDateHash = isnull(@ChangeDateHash, 'Z');
if (@FeedAuthors is not NULL) begin insert into @FeedTempAuthors (Id) select VAL from SplitString(@FeedAuthors, ',') end
declare @FeedTemp table ( FavoriteChangeDateHash nvarchar(16), ParentObjectUid uniqueidentifier NOT NULL, ParentObjectId bigint NOT NULL, IsArchive bit NOT NULL, UNIQUE NONCLUSTERED (ParentObjectUid ASC, ParentObjectId ASC) )
if (@FeedAuthors is NULL) --поиск без учета авторов begin
-- получаем все объекты, соответствующие условиям поиска insert into @FeedTemp (FavoriteChangeDateHash, ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId, IsArchive) select DISTINCT FavoriteChangeDateHash, ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId, Min(IsArchive) from ( select TOP (@MaxCount) ff.ChangeDateHash FavoriteChangeDateHash, ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId, 0 IsArchive from Feed fp WITH (NOLOCK) inner join FeedFavorite ff WITH (NOLOCK) on ff.ActionObjectUid = fp.ParentObjectUid and ff.ActionObjectId = fp.ParentObjectId and ff.Recipient = fp.Recipient and ff.IsDelete = 0 where fp.IsParent = 1 and fp.Recipient = @Recipient and fp.ChangeDate >= @ChangeDateFrom and (@ChangeDateTo is NULL or fp.ChangeDate <= @ChangeDateTo) and ff.ChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash and ( @FastSearch is NULL or fp.[Text] like @FastSearch or fp.[Subject] like @FastSearch ) order by ff.ChangeDateHash desc
union all
select TOP (@MaxCount) ff.ChangeDateHash FavoriteChangeDateHash, ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId, 1 IsArchive from FeedArchive fp WITH (NOLOCK) inner join FeedFavorite ff WITH (NOLOCK) on ff.ActionObjectUid = fp.ParentObjectUid and ff.ActionObjectId = fp.ParentObjectId and ff.Recipient = fp.Recipient and ff.IsDelete = 0 where fp.IsParent = 1 and fp.Recipient = @Recipient and fp.ChangeDate >= @ChangeDateFrom and (@ChangeDateTo is NULL or fp.ChangeDate <= @ChangeDateTo) and ff.ChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash and ( @FastSearch is NULL or fp.[Text] like @FastSearch or fp.[Subject] like @FastSearch ) order by ff.ChangeDateHash desc ) f
group by FavoriteChangeDateHash, ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId
select TOP (@MaxCount) Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, f.ParentObjectId, f.ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url], IsArchive from ( select TOP (@MaxCount) ft.FavoriteChangeDateHash, Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, fp.ParentObjectId, fp.ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url], 0 IsArchive from Feed fp WITH (NOLOCK) right join @FeedTemp ft on ft.IsArchive = 0 and ft.ParentObjectUid = fp.ParentObjectUid and ft.ParentObjectId = fp.ParentObjectId where fp.[IsParent] = 1 and fp.Recipient = @Recipient and ft.FavoriteChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash order by ft.FavoriteChangeDateHash DESC union all select TOP (@MaxCount) ft.FavoriteChangeDateHash, Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, fp.ParentObjectId, fp.ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url], 1 IsArchive from FeedArchive fp WITH (NOLOCK) right join @FeedTemp ft on ft.IsArchive = 1 and ft.ParentObjectUid = fp.ParentObjectUid and ft.ParentObjectId = fp.ParentObjectId where fp.[IsParent] = 1 and fp.Recipient = @Recipient and ft.FavoriteChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash order by ft.FavoriteChangeDateHash DESC ) f order by FavoriteChangeDateHash DESC
end else begin --поиск с учетом авторов
-- получаем все объекты, соответствующие условиям поиска insert into @FeedTemp (FavoriteChangeDateHash, ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId, IsArchive) select DISTINCT FavoriteChangeDateHash, ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId, Min(IsArchive) from ( select TOP (@MaxCount) ff.ChangeDateHash FavoriteChangeDateHash, ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId, 0 IsArchive from Feed fp WITH (NOLOCK) inner join FeedFavorite ff WITH (NOLOCK) on ff.ActionObjectUid = fp.ParentObjectUid and ff.ActionObjectId = fp.ParentObjectId and ff.Recipient = fp.Recipient and ff.IsDelete = 0 where fp.IsParent = 1 and fp.Recipient = @Recipient and fp.ChangeDate >= @ChangeDateFrom and (@ChangeDateTo is NULL or fp.ChangeDate <= @ChangeDateTo) and ff.ChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash and (fp.CreationAuthor in (select Id from @FeedTempAuthors)) and ( @FastSearch is NULL or fp.[Text] like @FastSearch or fp.[Subject] like @FastSearch ) order by ff.ChangeDateHash desc
union all
select TOP (@MaxCount) ff.ChangeDateHash FavoriteChangeDateHash, ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId, 1 IsArchive from FeedArchive fp WITH (NOLOCK) inner join FeedFavorite ff WITH (NOLOCK) on ff.ActionObjectUid = fp.ParentObjectUid and ff.ActionObjectId = fp.ParentObjectId and ff.Recipient = fp.Recipient and ff.IsDelete = 0 where fp.IsParent = 1 and fp.Recipient = @Recipient and fp.ChangeDate >= @ChangeDateFrom and (@ChangeDateTo is NULL or fp.ChangeDate <= @ChangeDateTo) and ff.ChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash and (fp.CreationAuthor in (select Id from @FeedTempAuthors)) and ( @FastSearch is NULL or fp.[Text] like @FastSearch or fp.[Subject] like @FastSearch ) order by ff.ChangeDateHash desc ) f
group by FavoriteChangeDateHash, ParentObjectUid, ParentObjectId
--родительские сообщения select TOP (@MaxCount) Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, f.ParentObjectId, f.ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url], IsArchive from ( select TOP (@MaxCount) ft.FavoriteChangeDateHash, Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, fp.ParentObjectId, fp.ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url], 0 IsArchive from Feed fp WITH (NOLOCK) right join @FeedTemp ft on ft.IsArchive = 0 and ft.ParentObjectUid = fp.ParentObjectUid and ft.ParentObjectId = fp.ParentObjectId where fp.[IsParent] = 1 and fp.Recipient = @Recipient and ft.FavoriteChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash order by ft.FavoriteChangeDateHash DESC union all select TOP (@MaxCount) ft.FavoriteChangeDateHash, Id, [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], ActionObjectUid, ActionUid, ActionObjectId, Recipient, CreationDate, ChangeDate, CreationAuthor, fp.ParentObjectId, fp.ParentObjectUid, IsRead, ReadDate, HasUnreadChild, UnreadCount, [Priority], ChangeDateHash, IsParent, ChildCount, MessageAttachments, ObjectRecipients, MessageObjects, [Url], 1 IsArchive from FeedArchive fp WITH (NOLOCK) right join @FeedTemp ft on ft.IsArchive = 1 and ft.ParentObjectUid = fp.ParentObjectUid and ft.ParentObjectId = fp.ParentObjectId where fp.[IsParent] = 1 and fp.Recipient = @Recipient and ft.FavoriteChangeDateHash < @ChangeDateHash order by ft.FavoriteChangeDateHash DESC ) f order by FavoriteChangeDateHash DESC
end
END

procedure.name: FeedCommentsLoad
FeedGetUnreadCount
procedure.text:
/**************************************************************************************
Возвращает количество непрочитанных сообщений для заданного пользователя.
**************************************************************************************/ CREATE PROCEDURE FeedGetUnreadCount @Recipient bigint, @Priority int AS BEGIN
SELECT 1 WithPriority, COUNT(f.Id) [Count] FROM Feed f with (nolock) WHERE f.Recipient = @Recipient and (f.IsRead = 0) and (f.Priority >= @Priority) UNION SELECT 0 WithPriority, COUNT(f.Id) [Count] FROM Feed f with (nolock) WHERE f.Recipient = @Recipient and (f.IsRead = 0)
END

procedure.name: FeedGetNewIds
FeedChangeDateHashFirst
procedure.text:
/**************************************************************************************
Возвращает первый hash из ленты сообщений.
**************************************************************************************/ CREATE PROCEDURE FeedChangeDateHashFirst @Recipient bigint AS BEGIN
select top 1 &&ChangeDateHash&& from &&Feed&& with (nolock) where &&IsParent&& = 1 and &&Recipient&& = @Recipient order by &&ChangeDateHash&&
END

procedure.name: FeedChangeDateHashLast
procedure.text:
/**************************************************************************************
Возвращает последний hash из ленты сообщений.
**************************************************************************************/ CREATE PROCEDURE FeedChangeDateHashLast @Recipient bigint AS BEGIN
select top 1 &&ChangeDateHash&& from &&Feed&& with (nolock) where &&IsParent&& = 1 and &&Recipient&& = @Recipient order by &&ChangeDateHash&& desc
END

procedure.name: FeedSetAsReadForObject
procedure.text:
/**************************************************************************************
Отметить все сообщения по указанному объекту, как прочитанные.
**************************************************************************************/ CREATE PROCEDURE FeedSetAsReadForObject @ReadDate datetime, @ParentObjectUid uniqueidentifier, @ParentObjectId bigint, @Recipient bigint AS BEGIN
UPDATE Feed SET IsRead = 1, HasUnreadChild = (CASE WHEN IsParent = 1 THEN 0 ELSE NULL END), UnreadCount = 0, ReadDate = @ReadDate WHERE ParentObjectUid = @ParentObjectUid AND ParentObjectId = @ParentObjectId AND Recipient = @Recipient
END

procedure.name: FeedGetReadedPostsIds
procedure.text:
/**************************************************************************************
Получить идентификаторы сообщений после указанной даты.
**************************************************************************************/ CREATE PROCEDURE FeedGetReadedPostsIds @Recipient bigint, @IsRead bit, @FromDate datetime AS BEGIN
select Id from Feed WITH (NOLOCK) where Recipient = @Recipient and IsRead = @IsRead and ((CONVERT(datetime, ISNULL(ReadDate, 0)) > CONVERT(datetime, ISNULL(@FromDate, 0))) or (ReadDate is null and @FromDate is null))
END

procedure.name: FeedLoadMessages
procedure.text:
/**************************************************************************************
Загружает сообщения без комментариев.
**************************************************************************************/ CREATE PROCEDURE FeedLoadMessages @Ids NVARCHAR(MAX) AS BEGIN
SELECT f.* FROM Feed f WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE f.IsParent = 1 AND f.Id in (select cast(val as bigint) as Id from SplitString(@Ids, ','))
END

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: update Feed SET Url = (SELECT MAX(i.Url) FROM InternalMailMessage i where not i.Url is null and i.ObjectId = Feed.ParentObjectId and i.ObjectUid = Feed.ParentObjectUid) where IsParent = 1 and (Url is null or Url = '')
update Feed set ChangeDateHash = LEFT(ChangeDateHash, 16) + right('0000000000000000000' + cast(Id as varchar(19)), 19) where IsParent = 1 and ChildCount > 0

procedure.name: FeedChildCountRecalc
procedure.text:
/**************************************************************************************
Пересчитать счётчики количества дочерних сообщений и количества непрочитанных дочерних сообщений. Процедура только для технического обслуживания ленты!!!
**************************************************************************************/ CREATE PROCEDURE FeedChildCountRecalc AS BEGIN
update Feed set ChildCount = fc.ChildCount, UnreadCount = fc.UnreadCount, HasUnreadChild = (CASE WHEN fc.UnreadCount = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) from ( select f.ParentObjectId, f.ParentObjectUid, f.Recipient, COUNT(f.Id) ChildCount, COUNT(case when f.IsRead = 0 then 1 end) UnreadCount from Feed f where f.IsParent = 0 group by f.ParentObjectId, f.ParentObjectUid, f.Recipient ) fc where Feed.IsParent = 1 and fc.ParentObjectId = Feed.ParentObjectId and fc.ParentObjectUid = Feed.ParentObjectUid and fc.Recipient = Feed.Recipient
END

script.name: Update_Feed_IdUpdate
script.text:
declare @t bigint
select @t = count(*) from sys.tables st where upper(st.name) = 'Feed' if @t = 1 begin select @t = max(Id) from Feed EXEC [G_GenId] 'Feed', @t end
select @t = count(*) from sys.procedures sp with (nolock) where Upper(sp.name) = 'G_Feed' if @t > 0 begin DROP PROCEDURE G_Feed end
select @t = count(*) from sys.tables st where upper(st.name) = 'GT_Feed' if @t > 0 begin drop table GT_Feed end

index.name: IX_Feed_Id
index.text: CREATE UNIQUE CLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Feed_Id] ON Feed ( [ChangeDateHash] DESC, [Id] ASC )

index.name: IX_Feed_RecParentHash
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Feed_RecParentHash] ON Feed ( [Recipient] ASC, [IsParent] ASC, [ChangeDateHash] ASC ) INCLUDE ( [ParentObjectId], [ParentObjectUid] )

index.name: IX_Feed_Parent
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Feed_Parent] ON Feed ( [ParentObjectUid] ASC, [ParentObjectId] DESC, [Recipient] ASC, [IsParent] ASC, [ChangeDate] DESC, [ChangeDateHash] DESC ) INCLUDE ( [Id], [Url], [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], [ActionObjectUid], [ActionUid], [ActionObjectId], [CreationDate], [IsRead], [HasUnreadChild], [UnreadCount], [Priority], [CreationAuthor], [ChildCount], [MessageAttachments], [ObjectRecipients], [MessageObjects] )

index.name: IX_Feed_ParentAuthors
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Feed_ParentAuthors] ON Feed ( [ParentObjectId] ASC, [ParentObjectUid] ASC, [IsParent] ASC, [ChangeDate] ASC, [Recipient] ASC, [ChangeDateHash] ASC, [CreationAuthor] ASC ) INCLUDE ( [Id], [Url], [Subject], [Text], [TextHtml], [ActionObjectUid], [ActionUid], [ActionObjectId], [CreationDate], [IsRead], [HasUnreadChild], [UnreadCount], [Priority] )

index.name: IX_Feed_RecipHash
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Feed_RecipHash] ON Feed ( [Recipient] ASC, [ChangeDate] DESC, [ChangeDateHash] DESC ) INCLUDE ( [Subject], [Url], [Text], [TextHtml], [Id], [ActionObjectUid], [ActionUid], [ActionObjectId], [CreationDate], [CreationAuthor], [ParentObjectId], [ParentObjectUid], [IsRead], [HasUnreadChild], [UnreadCount], [Priority], [IsParent] )

index.name: IX_Feed_RecIsRead
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Feed_RecIsRead] ON Feed ( [Recipient] ASC, [IsRead] ASC, [ReadDate] ASC ) INCLUDE ([Id])

index.name: IX_FeedArchive_Id
index.text: CREATE UNIQUE CLUSTERED INDEX [IX_FeedArchive_Id] ON FeedArchive ( [ChangeDateHash] DESC, [Id] ASC )

index.name: IX_Feed_IsParentRecipient
index.text: CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Feed_IsParentRecipient] ON [Feed] ( [IsParent] ASC, [Recipient] ASC, [ChangeDate] ASC ) INCLUDE ([ParentObjectId], [ParentObjectUid])
